subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received and brought the utmost joy. Praise be unto God, the divine friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید و نهایت سرور حاصل گردید الحمد لله یاران الهی در
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @personal instructions, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar]
